productDisplayName: Status Quo Men Solid White Shorts
description: Composition White shorts made of 100% cotton, has a flat front with insert pockets on the sides, welt pockets on the back with buttoned flaps, cargo pockets on the thighs with buttoned flaps, brand logo embroidered on the button flap of the right thigh pocket, appliqued brand patch on the back on the waistband, comfortable waistband with loops and a drawstring on the inside, and has a button and zipper closure on the front Fitting Regular Wash care Machine wash inside out separately in warm water with like colours Do not bleach Tumble dry medium Medium hot iron Do not iron directly on print/embroidery Rugged and masculine, these white cargo shorts from status quo give you an edgy look. The welt pockets on the back with buttoned flaps and cargo pockets on the thighs add interesting brand details. Crafted from 100% cotton, the fabric offers exemplary comfort. Team it with t-shirts. Model statistics The model wears shorts oflength 21" Height: 6'; Waist: 32"
